div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Italy (Kirk)
div.p: 2458. Following submitted reurtel 4093, December 17.Not printed; it requested information on the status of U.S. appropriations for UNRRA (840.50 UNRRA/12–1745).

list.item: Some two years ago Congress authorized contribution of $1,350,000,000Approved March 28,1944; 58 Stat. 122. but appropriated only $800 million to UNRRA.Approved June 30, 1944; 58 Stat. 629.

In December 1945 Congress appropriated (a) $550 million still due on first authorizationApproved December 14, 1945; 59 Stat. 609. (b) $750 million of second authorization.Approved December 28, 1945; 59 Stat. 652. Therefore, total authorized to date is $2,700 million, total appropriated to date $2,100 million balance $600 million, still to be appropriated.See chart in Woodbridge, UNRRA, vol. i, p. 113.
